description: Transfer system configuration - player trading rules and windows

preAuction.name: Pre-Auction Transfer Window
preAuction.description: Brief window before season auction for early moves

midSeason.name: Mid-Season Transfer Window
midSeason.description: Main transfer window during league stage

transferRules.description_squadSize: Teams must maintain 15-25 players at all times

bidIncrement.description: Bids must be at least 5% higher or $10K minimum

tradingRules.description: Multi-player trades allowed with optional cash compensation

roleProtection.description: Teams must maintain minimum role counts to prevent unbalanced squads

listingDuration.description: Players listed for transfer remain available for 1-14 days (default 7)

listingFee.description: 1% of asking price, minimum $5K (paid by seller when listing)

transferTax.description: No transfer taxes in current implementation

agentFees.description: 5% agent fee paid by buyer on top of transfer fee

age.description: Young players premium, older players discounted

transferMarketBehavior.description_biddingType: Direct purchase at asking price (no competitive bidding)
transferMarketBehavior.description_negotiation: Buyer can make 3 counter-offers before seller rejects
transferMarketBehavior.description_priceReduction: Unsold players' prices drop 2% per day after 3 days

aiTransferBehavior.description_interval: AI teams evaluate needs every match day

buyingTriggers.description: Conditions that trigger AI buying behavior

sellingTriggers.description: Conditions that trigger AI selling behavior

budgetAllocation.description: AI won't spend more than 20% budget on one player, keeps $500K reserve

restrictions.description_sellRestriction: Cannot sell a player within 2 matchdays of acquiring them
restrictions.description_buyRestriction: Cannot buy from same team within 1 matchday of previous purchase
restrictions.description_maxWithTeam: Maximum 5 transfers with same team per season

notifications.description: User notifications for transfer market events

notes: Transfer windows can be opened at specific times during season
Pre-auction window allows trades before auction starts
Mid-season window is the main trading period
All transfer fees flow through FinanceEngine
AI behavior is governed by squad needs and budget constraints
